name: Sparinvest Danske Aktier KL
summary: Sparivest Danske Aktier KL is an open ended equity mutual fund launched and managed by Sparinvest Fond√É¬¶glerselskab A/S. The fund primarily invests in the public equity markets of the Denmark. It makes its investments in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund seeks to replicate the performance of its portfolio by investing in stocks of companies listed on OMX C20 Index. It benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the OMX C20 Index. The fund was formerly known ad Sparinvest Danske Aktier. Sparivest Danske Aktier KL is domiciled in the Denmark.
